_comment: Multi-adapter iron-air demo: patentsview + jobs + news + filings + openalex. Shared LEI/domain external_ids. Built by scripts/build_multisource_case.py.

sources.title: [8-K] Capacity expansion detail for multi-day firming modules
sources.excerpt: Pilot plant capacity expansion for multi-day grid firming modules; utility interest cited.

sources.title: Alkaline electrolyte additives for iron-air grid modules
sources.excerpt: Electrolyte additives extend cycle life of iron-air grid modules under multi-day firming duty. The formulation is compatible with porous iron electrodes and oxygen electrode stacks used in regional utility pilots.

sources.title: FerroGrid signs iron powder supply with PureChitin Bio
sources.excerpt: FerroGrid Power signed a multi-year supplier agreement with PureChitin Bio for food-grade iron powder feedstock used in porous iron electrodes for multi-day grid firming modules.

sources.title: Oxygen electrode stacks for long-duration iron-air cells
sources.excerpt: Architecture study of oxygen electrodes for multi-day iron-air duty cycles and grid dispatch.

sources.title: [8-K] Material event: Arizona pilot plant capacity expansion
sources.excerpt: Board approved USD 120 million capex for Arizona pilot plant capacity expansion for iron-air multi-day storage modules.

sources.title: FerroGrid signs iron powder supply with PureChitin Bio
sources.excerpt: FerroGrid Power signed a multi-year supplier agreement with PureChitin Bio for food-grade iron powder feedstock used in porous iron electrodes for multi-day grid firming modules.

sources.title: [annual] Strategic investment in oxygen electrode manufacturing line
sources.excerpt: OxaCell Systems announced strategic investment to expand oxygen electrode manufacturing for multi-day iron-air customers.

sources.title: Oxygen electrode stack for long-duration iron-air modules
sources.excerpt: An oxygen electrode stack architecture improves efficiency of long-duration iron-air modules used for multi-day grid dispatch. The design reduces catalyst loading while maintaining reversible oxidation duty cycles.

sources.title: Metal-air electrochemical cell with iron anode for multi-day discharge
sources.excerpt: A metal-air cell uses a porous iron anode and oxygen cathode to provide multi-day depth of discharge suitable for grid firming applications. The cell supports reversible iron oxidation cycling under alkaline electrolyte conditions.

sources.title: Reversible iron oxidation pathways for multi-day storage
sources.excerpt: Laboratory review of reversible iron oxidation and porous electrode limits for multi-day grid storage concepts.

sources.title: LongHaul Energy pilots hundred-hour iron-air with utilities
sources.excerpt: LongHaul Energy is piloting hundred-hour depth-discharge iron-air modules for regional utility grid firming and dispatchable firming contracts using reversible iron oxidation.

sources.title: Applications engineer — utility firming pilots
sources.excerpt: Support hundred-hour depth-discharge iron-air pilots with regional utility grid firming contracts.

sources.title: Porous iron electrode structures for hundred-hour storage
sources.excerpt: Porous iron electrode structures enable hundred-hour depth-discharge operation in iron-air systems. Feedstock morphology of food-grade iron powder is controlled to stabilize reversible iron oxidation over repeated cycles.

sources.title: Manufacturing technician — oxygen electrode lines
sources.excerpt: Expand oxygen electrode manufacturing for multi-day iron-air storage customers.

sources.title: Electrochemical engineer — iron-air stack scale-up
sources.excerpt: Hiring electrochemical engineers for porous iron electrode and long-duration grid-dispatch stack scale-up in Arizona. Skills: electrochemistry, alkaline systems, pilot manufacturing.
